hintDisplay: Sujeto: Ellos / Verbo: estar (presente continuo) / Verbo: gastar / Complemento: mucho dinero / Complemento: en la tienda / Tiempo: hoy

correctSentence: They are not spending much money at the store today.

correctSentence: I am not comparing the prices of these two shirts right now.

correctSentence: I am saving money by shopping during the sale.
